title: World Cup schedule, results: France, Spain and Belgium win their groups while Cape Verde advances to knockout stage on Friday
original_text:
World Cup schedule, results: France, Spain and Belgium win their groups while Cape Verde advances to knockout stage on Friday
The 2026 FIFA World Cup is underway as the global spectacle takes place across North America. This edition will be the biggest in the tournament's history, featuring 48 teams spread across 12 groups all vying the for the coveted trophy.
Eleven cities in the U.S., three in Mexico and two in Canada will play host over a month of action.
